GAP-1.description: False bound v <= u^{C'} in Lemma 4.2

GAP-2.description: C-absorption in exp step (Lemma 4.1 inductive step)

GAP-3.description: Depth census T30(c) relied on external citations T09, T10, T20, T21 without self-contained proofs
GAP-3.closed_by: Depth_Spectrum_Self_Contained.tex Theorem 6.1 (complete census with explicit EML trees)

sinh_depth.lower_bound: No 2-node EML tree produces sinh(x); proved by case analysis on Form-A and Form-B 2-node trees

cosh_depth.justification: Addition of two depth-1 terms (e^x + e^{-x}) costs 3 nodes; lower bound same as sinh

sin_cos_over_C_depth.note: sin/cos over C have depth 3 (not 1); tan over C has depth 1 via Euler gateway T07

ln_depth.via: eml(0,x) = 1-ln(x) (1 node), free output shift gives ln(x); or EXL bridge 2-node equivalence
ln_depth.note: Depth 2 under pure EML with EXL bridge; depth 1 in extended-leaf grammar

GAP-3.note: Correcting sinh/cosh from depth 2 to 3 does NOT invalidate T30(c): the claim is depth <= 3, which holds.

GAP-4.description: Division case f/g missing from Hardy field growth ceiling inductive step (Lemma 4.1)
GAP-4.argument: Hardy fields are closed under division by nonzero elements. Three sub-cases: (1) g->+inf: 1/g->0, trivially bounded; (2) g bounded away from 0: 1/g bounded, multiply by f bound; (3) g->0+: 1/g in H_{k-1} by Hardy field closure, apply inductive hypothesis to 1/g then use multiplication case.

depth_infinity: cos(x) over R (T01: Infinite Zeros Barrier)

t30_parts_status.(c) depth_census: PROVED (GAP-3 self-contained census now closed; sinh/cosh corrected to depth 3)

changes: Correct depth table: sinh and cosh are depth 3, not depth 2
Update status line from PROPOSITION to THEOREM for T30
Add note about GAP-3 and GAP-4 closure
Correct sin/cos over C: depth 3 (not 1); tan over C: depth 1
